overview: KLU Spotter is a Smart Campus Occupancy System for KL University that helps students find empty classrooms in real time. It features a dramatic animated auth screen, live session-based room availability, cluster-specific schedule rules, and a dark-themed room grid with glowing status badges — all powered by a Motoko backend storing the full timetable.
features: Animated auth screen with sliding red panels and burst login popup
Live session engine mapping S1-S13 (7:10 AM–7:20 PM) to current time
Cluster toggle C1 (Saturday off) / C2 (Monday off) with holiday enforcement
Dark-themed room grid organized by block (R/C/M) with glowing green Empty badges
Full backend timetable storage in Motoko canister — no hardcoded data
